fields.label: What is your full name?
fields.helpText: First and last name, as it appears on your paycheck.

fields.label: What is your Employee ID?
fields.helpText: Your employee ID number, if you have one. Check your badge or ask HR if you're not sure.

fields.label: Last 4 digits of your SSN?
fields.helpText: Just the last four digits of your Social Security Number. Used to verify your identity.

fields.label: What company do you work for?
fields.helpText: The name of your employer.

fields.label: What would you like to do?
fields.helpText: Are you setting up direct deposit for the first time, changing your bank info, or canceling?

options.label: Set up direct deposit for the first time
Cancel direct deposit (go back to paper checks)

fields.label: What type of bank account?
fields.helpText: Choose the type of account where you want your paycheck deposited.

fields.label: What is your bank's name?
fields.helpText: The name of the bank or credit union where you want your pay deposited.

fields.label: What is the routing number?
fields.helpText: A 9-digit number that identifies your bank. You can find it at the bottom-left of a check, or in your bank's mobile app under account details.

fields.label: What is your account number?
fields.helpText: Your bank account number. Found on checks (the middle number at the bottom) or in your bank's app. Double-check this carefully — a wrong digit means your pay goes to the wrong place!

fields.label: How much of your paycheck should go to this account?
fields.helpText: You can deposit your entire paycheck, a fixed dollar amount, or a percentage.

fields.label: How much per paycheck?
fields.helpText: Enter the dollar amount you want deposited into this account each pay period.

fields.label: What percentage of your paycheck?
fields.helpText: Enter a number from 1 to 100. For example, enter 75 to deposit 75% of your pay.

fields.label: Do you want to split your pay into a second account?
fields.helpText: Some people split their paycheck — for example, putting a portion into savings and the rest into checking.

fields.label: What type is your second account?
Second account bank name?
fields.helpText: The bank or credit union for your second account.

fields.label: Second account routing number?
fields.helpText: The 9-digit routing number for your second bank.

fields.label: Second account number?
fields.helpText: The account number for your second bank account.

fields.label: How much goes into the second account?
fields.helpText: The remainder after your first account deposit goes here, or you can specify an amount or percentage.

fields.label: Dollar amount for the second account?
fields.helpText: The fixed dollar amount to deposit into your second account each pay period.

fields.label: Percentage for the second account?
fields.helpText: The percentage of your paycheck to deposit into your second account.

fields.label: Your signature
fields.helpText: By signing, you authorize your employer to deposit your pay into the account(s) listed above. This authorization stays in effect until you submit a new form or cancel it in writing.

fields.label: Today's date
fields.helpText: The date you are signing this form.
